subtask: issue-17-3.3.1-pdf-normalizer (fix cycle attempt 1 of 3, addressing 015-verification finding F1)

commits.summary: fix: replace ambiguous page marker regex with length-prefixed framing
docs: record final commit hash for fix-cycle 016-implementation (back-fills regression.jsonl commit field)

fix_summary: Switched normalize_pdf's marker format from content-scanning [[PAGE n]]...[[/PAGE n]] to length-prefixed [[PAGE n LEN=k]]...[[/PAGE n]], with a new iter_pages() public parser that slices exactly k characters as payload instead of scanning for a closing marker in content. This closes the whole delimiter-in-payload collision class, not just the reproduced self-referential case.
test_status: 9/9 passed, run 3x for flakiness, all consistent
next_step: Requires independent re-verification via /cdr:verify before this fix cycle can be closed (invariant I4 -- this agent does not verify its own work).
